description: A vertical graphic combining a photograph with a headline and quote block. The top half is a color photo of Donald Trump (seen from behind, dark navy suit, blond hair) facing a crowd behind a rope line on a lawn. The crowd, children and adults, wear red 'TRUMP' caps and American-flag shirts, many with painted faces and raised phones; several have raised fists and are smiling. A dark navy gradient fades the lower portion. Over it, large white serif typography reads italic 'Delivering for' above bold all-caps 'WORKING FAMILIES!'. Below sits a white text card headed 'THE SACRAMENTO BEE' containing body text: 'The bill extends tax benefits to millions of working families and provides new incentives for employers to get involved in child and dependent care. The First Five Years Fund, a Washington-based advocacy group, estimates that a family of four with two children and an income of $43,000 to $150,000 could get a credit of up to $2,100 for child care expenses, or $900 more than under current law. It estimates that 4 million families can receive higher credits, including two-earner households with incomes up to $206,000 and single-income households with incomes up to $103,000.' A small circular agency seal sits at the bottom.
notable_text: Delivering for WORKING FAMILIES!; THE SACRAMENTO BEE; The bill extends tax benefits to millions of working families ... 4 million families can receive higher credits
